hero.title: About Local AI
hero.lead: A community for anyone interested in running AI on their own machine, offline, privately, and without token costs.

whatIsLocalAI.title: What is Local AI?
whatIsLocalAI.lead: You can run AI entirely on your laptop or computer, without internet, for free, and without data leaving your device.

facts.title: It works without an internet connection
facts.body: Once it is set up on your computer, it runs entirely offline. No connection needed at all.

facts.title: Your conversations stay on your machine
facts.body: Nothing is sent to any server. Not to the model makers, not to anyone. It never leaves your computer.

facts.title: The models are free and open source
facts.body: No subscription, no per-query fees. The models are openly published and anyone can use them.

cards.title: Events
cards.body: Casual meetups, workshops for beginners and advanced hobbyists, and demo nights where people show what they're building. In person across Australian cities and online.

cards.title: Curated Resources
cards.body: Maintained lists of the best tools, models, projects, and links across all local AI focus areas. Kept up to date as the space moves, so you don't have to dig.

cards.title: Online Discussions
cards.body: Between meetups the community stays connected via chat. Share what you're building, get help with your setup, and stay across what's new in the open model ecosystem.

whoItsFor.title:
Everyone,
at every level
whoItsFor.lead: There's a lot written about local AI online but it's scattered, assumes you know the lingo, and there's nowhere to discuss it in person. This is that place.

cards.title: Complete Newcomers
cards.body: Never run AI locally before? Neither had most of us. Come to a meetup and see what's possible on the laptop you already own. No jargon, no prerequisites.

cards.title: Hobbyists & Tinkerers
cards.body: Already running models at home, testing new releases, or building your own setup? This is the in-person version of those Reddit threads.

cards.title: Developers & Builders
cards.body: Integrating local models into your work or projects? No API costs, no data leaving the machine. Connect with others building on the open model ecosystem.
